description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows build that runs on workflow dispatch, push to release/* branches, and pull requests to the master branch. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository, caches pip, transformers models, and text2vec models, installs miniconda with Python 3.9, installs and tests torch, installs dependencies from requirements.txt, runs package tests with unittest, and installs the package from PyPI.
